key_concepts: Megatron-style col->row pair, one all-reduce per block
alpha-beta cost model for ring all-reduce
QKV head sharding with GQA num_kv_head_replicas
TP weight halving vs sub-linear throughput scaling
prerequisites_assumed: Ch01 attention head structure (Q/K/V projection layout)
Ch03 PagedAttention/FlashAttention forward pass shape conventions
linear algebra: block matrix multiplication, matrix transpose
ring algorithm intuition (the alpha-beta latency-bandwidth split)
summary.narrative_tone: first-principles math derivation paired with class-by-class source walkthrough; formula-heavy
summary.running_example_stage: Llama-style attention block + MLP block under tp_size in {1, 2, 4}

changelog.action: Initial v6 implementation: 6 .py modules + impl-notes + demo numerics; replaces inaccurate placeholder context.json (chapter_id was 09-, dependencies were missing Ch03).
